_comment: Flag catalog — bit flags packed into the Card.flags u16 field. Bit assignments are authoritative in spacetime/server/spacetimedb/src/packing.rs.

stack_state._comment: 2-bit field at bits 6-7 encoding the card's positional role. Set by attach/stack reducers; not authored directly. The card's micro_location field is reinterpreted per state — see packing.rs.
stack_state.loose: 00 — root card, position via macro/micro_zone + cosmetic pixel offset in micro_location
stack_state.stack_up: 01 — stacked above its parent rect; micro_location holds parent card_id
stack_state.stack_down: 10 — stacked below its parent rect; micro_location holds parent card_id
stack_state.attached: 11 — root anchored to a hex card; micro_location holds the hex card_id, or 0 = 'whatever floor sits at my own (macro_zone, micro_zone)'

_reserved_bits: bits 4-5, 8-15 reserved for future flag use.
